cards.title: Zoom Expands Agentic AI Platform With Workflow Orchestration
tldr: **Zoom is expanding its Agentic AI platform to include new workflow orchestration capabilities.**
This expansion focuses on integrating AI agents to manage and automate complex operational workflows.
The development aims to enhance automation and efficiency across various business processes.

cards.title: AIUC-1 certification: the next chapter in trusted agentic automation
tldr: **UiPath announces the AIUC-1 certification for trusted agentic automation.**
This certification aims to establish standards for reliable and autonomous AI agents.
It signifies a new phase in the development and deployment of AI-powered automation.

cards.title: How an Engineering Firm Cut Project Estimation Time with AI
tldr: **An engineering firm significantly reduced project estimation time by implementing AI solutions.**
The article details how AI automates Work Breakdown Structure (WBS) creation for faster, more accurate estimates.
This approach helps project managers improve planning efficiency and enhance bid competitiveness for new projects.

cards.title: The Prosci AI Integration Framework
tldr: **Prosci's new AI Integration Framework provides a structured approach for managing AI-driven organizational change.**
The framework guides leaders and teams through the complexities of integrating artificial intelligence into business processes.
It helps organizations, including PMOs, effectively navigate the people-side of AI adoption to maximize value.

cards.title: Microsoft and Anthropic partner to advance Copilot AI agents
tldr: **Microsoft and Anthropic collaborate to enhance Copilot AI agents for project management tasks.**
The partnership aims to integrate advanced AI models into Copilot, improving its capabilities for complex project workflows.
These enhanced AI agents are expected to assist PMOs in areas like planning, reporting, and decision-making.

cards.title: Shifting Bottleneck: How AI Is Reshaping the Software Development Lifecycle
tldr: **AI is fundamentally reshaping the Software Development Lifecycle by identifying and shifting traditional bottlenecks.**
AI tools enhance various SDLC phases, from requirements to deployment, improving overall project velocity and quality.
This transformation enables PMOs to achieve more predictable project outcomes and optimize resource allocation.

cards.title: Zoom introduces agentic AI capabilities to drive productivity and action at work
tldr: **Zoom introduces new agentic AI capabilities aimed at boosting workplace productivity.**
These AI features are designed to drive action and streamline various work processes.
The technology could assist teams in automating routine tasks and improving overall operational efficiency.

cards.title: Google’s Gemini AI wants to do the busywork in Docs and Sheets
tldr: **Google's Gemini AI introduces new features to automate busywork in Docs, Sheets, and Slides.**
Gemini can generate documents from existing files and analyze spreadsheets using plain-language prompts.
These AI capabilities aim to eliminate drudgery in creating and updating documents, relevant to administrative tasks.

cards.title: Introducing AI Teammates: your new AI-powered helpers in ...
tldr: **Teamwork.com introduces "AI Teammates" and "TeamworkAI" to enhance project management capabilities.**
These new AI-powered helpers are designed to deliver faster, sharper client projects within the platform.
The AI features, like "Summarize with AI", could assist with project documentation and communication.

cards.title: Brainstorming with AI Tools - ProjectManagement.com
tldr: **The article explores methods for effective brainstorming using various AI-powered tools.**
It likely details how AI can assist in generating diverse ideas and solutions.
This approach is relevant to project teams seeking innovative ideation techniques.

cards.title: Enterprise AI agents are multiplying fast, and Microsoft wants full control of them
tldr: **Microsoft introduces "Agent 365" to manage the proliferation of enterprise AI agents.**
The initiative aims to provide comprehensive control over rapidly multiplying AI agents within organizations.
This development is relevant to organizations seeking to govern and integrate new AI technologies effectively.

cards.title: AI Agents for Risk Advisory | V7 Solutions
tldr: **V7 Solutions introduces AI agents designed to automate and accelerate risk advisory processes.**
These agents extract, structure, and analyze exposure data from policies, claims, and regulatory documents.
The platform aims to reduce manual risk review time, improve decision-making, and enhance traceability.

cards.title: Show HN: VS Code Agent Kanban: Task Management for the AI ...
tldr: VS Code Agent Kanban integrates a GitOps-friendly kanban board for AI-assisted developer task management.
It uses a structured markdown task format to create a permanent source of truth for decisions and actions.
It combats 'context rot' in AI coding, ensuring agents retain past decisions and planning effectively.

cards.title: Guided Lab: Project Management Application with Lovable AI
tldr: **A guided lab explores developing a project management application leveraging AI.**
Participants engage in a practical, hands-on session to apply AI in project contexts.
The lab aims to create an intuitive and effective AI solution for project management tasks.

cards.title: Microsoft wants you to ‘hire’ its AI agents
tldr: **Microsoft is actively encouraging organizations to adopt its AI agents for various operational roles.**
These AI agents are positioned to automate routine tasks, freeing up human resources for strategic project work.
The article explores how these AI agents can enhance efficiency and support decision-making within project management offices.

cards.title: Best AI Project Management Tools for Small Business in 2026
tldr: **This guide identifies the best AI project management tools for small businesses in 2026.**
These tools provide features such as automatic task creation from meeting notes and AI-generated project timelines.
They help small teams achieve structure, visibility, and automation in project planning and delivery.

cards.title: Microsoft brings Anthropic's Claude Cowork into Copilot to run tasks across Outlook, Teams, and Excel
tldr: **Microsoft integrated Anthropic's Claude Cowork into Copilot for autonomous task execution.**
Users describe tasks, and Cowork builds a plan using data from Outlook, Teams, and Excel.
Copilot can now autonomously run tasks across Microsoft 365 apps, relevant for automating routine office work.

cards.title: Top 5 Sembly AI Alternatives for AI Meeting Notes [2026]
tldr: **The article reviews top alternatives for AI meeting notes, highlighting HappyScribe's AI Notetaker.**
HappyScribe provides AI Notetaker, Subtitles, and Transcription services supporting over 120 languages.
These tools capture meetings, delivering instant notes, summaries, and action items for professional use.

cards.title: Microsoft Recommits to AI Agents With New Copilot Features
tldr: Microsoft is enhancing its Copilot features, signaling a renewed commitment to AI agents.
These advancements aim to integrate more sophisticated AI capabilities into daily business operations.
Such agentic AI developments could assist with automating routine tasks and improving workflow efficiency.

cards.title: Production AI Playbook: Human Oversight
tldr: **The article highlights the critical importance of human oversight in production AI systems to mitigate potential liabilities.**
It outlines three practical human-in-the-loop patterns: HITL for validation, HOTL for monitoring, and HOTL for intervention.
These patterns offer a framework for integrating human control into AI workflows, crucial for risk management and quality assurance.
